headline: P&L exposure: ₹20.8 Cr direct green premium (engine estimate) + further upside from green financing and ESG index inclusion
what_matters: Potential for P/E expansion of 0.05x as ESG funds and passive indices increase allocation; margin uplift of 10.0 bps and direct green premium of ₹20.8 Cr (engine estimate).
Green hydrogen commissioning under the PLI scheme unlocks access to green financing and may lower bond spreads by 10-20 bps as per EU Taxonomy alignment.
No supply chain transmission; the event is a direct operational shift within JSW Energy's own assets.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹20.8 Cr direct green premium (engine estimate) + further upside from green financing and ESG index inclusion
Revenue at risk: No revenue at risk; event is a revenue and margin opportunity
